MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Balwant Thakor, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Edward Lange, are present.
Attorney, Denise Mingrone, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schronenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
